phase1.task_description:
toxic status counter
Hey,

It seems to me that the status counter for toxic was off, so I added a reset to the counter under def _switch_in(self, details=None)
and I think solved the problem. Let me know if this is correct :)

phase1_regex_view.task_description:
toxic status counter
Hey,

It seems to me that the status counter for toxic was off, so I added a reset to the counter under def _switch_in(self, details=None)
and I think solved the problem. Let me know if this is correct :)
